name: standardize-video-editor-20260331-2343
idea:
Standardize video editor effects system

## Problem Statement
Two areas of simplification:

### Area 1: Entrance/Exit unification
Entrance and exit effects are structurally identical (same EffectComponentProps, same data shape). The only difference is progress direction: entrance 0→1 from start, exit 0→1 from end. Currently 11 entrance and 6 exit effects in separate files with separate registries. Goal: single effect catalog where each effect defines a transform from progress 0→1. Entrance plays forward, exit plays reversed. Every effect works as both. Custom effects created once.

### Area 2: Continuous effects looping
5 built-in continuous effects have inconsistent behavior. Float/Glitch truly loop (sine/modulo). Ken Burns/Slow Zoom/Drift are one-shot (linear 0→1, stop at end). Goal: add loop boolean param (default true). When loop=true, progress ping-pongs or repeats. UI exposes toggle. User wants continuous to mean continuous by default.

## Key Files
- src/tools/video-editor/effects/entrances.tsx, exits.tsx, continuous.tsx, index.tsx
- src/tools/video-editor/effects/DynamicEffectRegistry.ts, compileEffect.tsx
- src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts (ClipEntrance, ClipExit, ClipContinuous)
- src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx
- src/tools/video-editor/compositions/VisualClip.tsx, EffectLayerSequence.tsx
- src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts, config-utils.ts
- src/features/resources/hooks/useResources.ts (EffectMetadata)
- src/tools/video-editor/effects/effectPromptTemplate.ts

## Constraints
- Backwards compatible with saved timeline configs
- Custom effects must continue working
- Simplification not complexity
